'''Eirraucs''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species from [[Eirrauus]]. They were easily recognizable from their six [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] and long, four-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] faces. Eirraucs moved with a "leaping run," using their rear and middle pairs of limbs to swiftly travel the plains of their homeworld. Their middle limbs could also be used as arms, supplementing their upper limbs. Eirraucs were peaceful omnivores, feeding on grasses, fruits, and carrion.<ref name="Wanderer of Worlds" />

The Eirraucs were ill-prepared when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] arrived to conquer their homeworld. Unable to resist, they were subjugated and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]].<ref name="Wanderer of Worlds" />

[[Daushoroc]], [[Tamoss]],<ref name="Wanderer of Worlds" /> and [[Puroth]]<ref name="Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous">{{InsiderCite|86|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}}</ref> all belonged to this species.
